text: If grocery stores can be open and people can risk their lives working there, then so can the schools and teachers.

@realDonaldTrump They are using schools as a political gain on their part. They think if schools don’t open it will be “Trump’s fault” therefore blowing the election in their favor. They don’t want to see the economy open either.
@GovStitt if schools do not open, teachers shouldn’t get paid!  The demands & nonsense needs to stop!
Shutting down schools may leave us teachers with No Work No Pay

If teachers are essential then return to work and do their job. If they're not essential that's fine. Close the schools, give the money to the kids, and let the parents educate their children. You can't refuse to go to work but still get paid.
Open #texas #Schools is a must for our kids!!
